questionHtml: Calculate, in m, the length of the thread. State your answer to an appropriate number of significant figures.
markschemeHtml:
identifies T as 2.25 s ✔

L = 1.26 m ✔

1.3 / 1.26 «m» ✔

Accept any number of s.f. for MP2.

Accept any answer with 2 or 3 s.f. for MP3.

meta.title: Calculate, in m, the length of the thread. State your answer to an appropriate number of significant figures.
